raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XX/XX/year>, my credit card was charged by XXXX rental without my authorization. I was provided a rental car by XXXX XXXX for warranty work on my car. They paid the bill but the XXXX charged my credit car because it was on file for a previous rental. XXXX acknowledged their error but has not refunded the charge. XXXX XXXX confirmed via e-mail that they paid the rental bill. I disputed the charge with Citibank because XXXX has not been provided a refund after numerous requests for a refund. I provide the e-mail to Citibank that shows XXXX XXXX paid the bill and I also sent a copy of the Rental Agreement between XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX which show the XXXX XXXX account information for the rental reservation. Unfortunately, it doesn't appear that Citibank read the information provided because they somehow determined I was responsible for paying the bill although the e-mail clearly states the bill was already paid by XXXX XXXX.
